evals.prompt: I need to build an inbox screen for our customer support module. It should work for WideBot brand, support both Arabic and English, and have a conversation list on the left with a chat panel on the right.
evals.expected_output: Should fetch DS registries from GitHub, identify relevant DS components (list, panel, ai-chat, tabs, etc.), ask clarifying questions about brand/direction, then orchestrate ui-feature-builder to generate specs. Should NOT create any custom components.

evals.prompt: The dashboard needs a custom gradient background with #1a1a2e to #16213e colors and a rounded card with 20px border radius and a new chart component we don't have yet.
evals.expected_output: Should REJECT the hex colors and pixel values, explain that all values must come from DS tokens. Should check ai-component-registry.json for chart component, find it doesn't exist, and create a DS Proposal template instead of building a custom one.

evals.prompt: Write user stories for a workflow approval system in the Hulul ERP. Managers need to approve leave requests, purchase orders, and expense reports.
evals.expected_output: Should set brand=hulul (WCAG AA), orchestrate pm-toolkit for user stories with Gherkin scenarios, cross-reference DS components (dialog, button, data-grid, stepper, toast) to ensure stories reference real components. Should validate that all UI elements in the stories exist in the DS.
